tools.title: ESLint
tools.description: A pluggable and configurable linter tool for identifying and reporting on patterns in JavaScript and TypeScript. Enforce code quality rules, catch bugs early, and maintain consistent style across your codebase.

tools.title: CodeRabbit
tools.description: AI-powered code review tool that automatically reviews pull requests, identifies bugs, suggests improvements, and generates summaries. Integrates with GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket to accelerate code reviews.

tools.title: Mintlify
tools.description: Modern documentation platform for developer tools. Automatically generate beautiful documentation from your codebase, add interactive API playgrounds, and keep docs in sync with your code.
